response.global_analysis: 1. Audio Match: The promotional voice-over perfectly matches the transcribed vocal segments. 2. Visual Events: Included on-screen text translations for the concert notice/attention cards and the holoplus Jack promo card to ensure accessibility. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles for the spoken advertisement are tightly aligned to vocal cues, while the text-based slides match their exact on-screen duration.

subtitles.original: 開演までしばらくお待ちください
subtitles.english: The concert will be starting soon. Please wait a moment.

subtitles.original: 演出の都合上、照明の明滅にご注意ください / 声出し応援OKです
subtitles.english: Please be aware of flashing lights / Cheering loudly is OK

subtitles.original: 歌いたくなっちゃった！
subtitles.english: and now I really want to sing!

subtitles.original: 推しのシーン見ながらカラオケ歌えるなんて
subtitles.english: Being able to sing karaoke while watching my favorite scenes...

subtitles.original: 歌いたいアニメ・ゲームソング見つけよう！
subtitles.english: Let's find the anime and game songs you want to sing!
